description_long: This house features a prominent gable roof with a steep pitch and a symmetrical facade. The front includes a covered porch supported by columns, leading to a central entryway flanked by windows. The exterior walls are finished with a combination of stonework on the lower level and siding above, giving a Craftsman-inspired appearance. Large windows are arranged in regular rows on both floors, providing ample natural light. The rear of the house includes a double garage with driveway access, and the side elevations show additional windows and a secondary entry. The property is set on a rectangular grassy plot, with paved walkways and driveways integrated into the design.
description: A two-story Craftsman-style house with a steep gable roof, stone and siding exterior, covered front porch, and a rear double garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, central entryway, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the gable roof, stone and siding exterior, and side windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the double garage doors, driveway, and upper-level windows.
description_view_3: Right side view with additional windows and a secondary entry, matching the left side's design.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with covered porch, columns, steps, and decorative trim
